response.overview: Lost in the muck and mire of Hocking Hills, Ohio, 11 groomsmen are put to the test for the ultimate prize: to stand a bit closer to Noah on his wedding day. Through challenges determining peak athleticism, culinary skills, and firearm capabilities, host and bridegroom Noah finds out how loyal—or desperate—his friends really are.
response.tagline: One Groom. Fight For Your Room.
response.title: Survivor - Noah's Bachelor Weekend
